headline: VICI Properties' Q1 AFFO Meets Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: VICI posts Q1 2026 AFFO in line with estimates as revenues climb year over year, while a higher full-year outlook signals confidence in growth.

headline: EQIX Q1 AFFO & Revenues Miss Estimates on Higher Expenses
summary: Equinix's higher Q1 costs and lower non-recurring revenues tempered results, but increased recurring revenues and record bookings supported the results.

raw.headline: EQIX Q1 AFFO & Revenues Miss Estimates on Higher Expenses

headline: SBAC Q1 FFO & Revenues Beat Estimates on Higher Leasing Revenue
summary: SBAC beat Q1 estimates as international leasing revenues surge 32.6%, helping lift full-year 2026 guidance despite rising costs.

headline: Iron Mountain's Q1 AFFO Tops Estimates on Data Center, ALM Strength
summary: IRM beats Q1 AFFO estimates with 22% growth as data centers and services surge, prompting a 2026 outlook raise and reinforcing strong demand momentum.
